candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; best direct match for total revenue/sales.

variables.notes: No clear cost of goods sold/cost of sales line is reported. This is a bank-style income statement with interest expense, provisions, and operating expense buckets rather than COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-type overhead line and populated; per rule, prefer explicit SG&A row and select only that row.
Explicit SG&A label, but preview is empty; less preferred than the populated combined SG&A row.

variables.notes: Used the explicit populated SG&A/overhead row. Excluded Bank Operating Expense because it appears to be a broader subtotal that likely includes D&A and other items.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the income statement.

candidates.row_label: Total Interest Expense - Business - Total - no b/d
candidates.why: Best single interest expense line; preferred over a narrower component such as Other interest expenses.
Interest-related, but only a component and not the full interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Total Interest Expense - Business - Total - no b/d

variables.notes: Priority list uses the total interest expense line first, with Other interest expenses as fallback if needed in some years.

candidates.why: Best available equity line. The balance sheet appears to show one Total Equity before Minority Interest and another after it; BE should use equity excluding minority interest.
Equity component only, not full book equity.
Specific equity component, not total parent equity.
Income statement item, not book equity.

variables.notes: Selected Total Equity for book equity. Based on the ordering and values, the first Total Equity row appears to exclude Minority Interest, while a later Total Equity includes it. Since the schema only allows sheet_name + row_label and not row position, this mapping relies on the label alone; MIB is mapped separately to Minority Interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement flow item, not balance-sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Direct match for minority interest / non-controlling interests.
